# Agent Skill bundles

- `iread-agent-skill-0.2.0-beta.6.zip`: current portable iRead Agent Skill for custom-Skill import.
- `iread-agent-skill-0.2.0-beta.5.zip`: previous Beta 5 bundle retained for reproducibility.
- `SHA256SUMS`: checksum for the downloadable bundle.

The bundle contains only `SKILL.md`, progressive references, and deterministic local bootstrap scripts. It does not contain credentials, runtime data, subscriptions, reports, or third-party article bodies.
